evidence: "This is a superior film to 'Breathless', IMHO, .. the film is total eye candy..."
"It's gratifying to see a noir film from the 40's that has so many strong female characters in it."
"...the screenplay to the proposed film is supposed to be about the death of romance between Ulysses and Penelope in Homer's 'Odyssey'..."
"...the roles are played by members of the opposite sex, and all of the ladies are outstanding in their assigned roles."
"...the action moves quickly and the cinematography is atmospheric and well done."
"...it's VERY cartoony stuff and very, very funny. I loved it."
"Boy, this movie deserved a better fate. The film looks like mud."
"...the quality of the prints are very poor-there's lots of dirt on them in every episode."
"Director Bertrand Mandico is a director of great promise, and I look forward to seeing more mind-blowing films from him."
"Godard really deserves more credit, he's a consummate filmmaker..."
"...the cinematography is atmospheric and well done."
"...the film is total eye candy, if not due to the awesome BB, then by the gorgeous locations..."
"...the story recalls the best stories by Cornell Woolrich (The Bride Wore Black) and David Goodis (Dark Passage)."
"...the roles are played by members of the opposite sex, and all of the ladies are outstanding in their assigned roles."

summary: The user has a strong preference for complex narratives across genres like drama, horror, and comedy, often appreciating fast pacing and high production quality. They show a notable emotional engagement with the content, valuing atmospheric and visually rich experiences.
